violations.text: The handwashing sink in the kitchen on the entrance wall was observed broken. Establishment is in the process of repairing hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door true in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2026
The floor by the dishwasher was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrective Action - Establishment must have the dishwasher serviced, establishment is to move all wash, rinse, and sanitizing to the three bay sink. Sink and Surface Cleaners measured at correct concentration at three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
